zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Herman von Winzenburg I於1083年出生在德國時，他的父親Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN34歲，母親Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress28歲。他於大約1107年與Hedwig di Istria在德國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1122年在德國海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 澤格波格巴德 澤格波格享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Herman von Winzenburg I于1083年出生在德国时，他的父亲Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN34岁，母亲Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress28岁。他于大约1107年与Hedwig di Istria在德国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1122年在德国海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 澤格波格巴德 澤格波格享年39岁。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Herman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Hermann , from a Germanic personal name derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. The name was in use among the Normans and was borne by many immigrants from the Low Countries in the 15th century. Perhaps because of that it continued in occasional use well into the 1700s. It was revived more generally in Britain in the 19th century, when it also became common in America, most probably as a result of the influence of German immigrants.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Herman von Winzenburg I was born in 1083, in Germany, his father, Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN, was 34 and his mother, Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress, was 28. He married Hedwig di Istria about 1107, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1122, in Bad Segeberg, Segeberg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Herman von Winzenburg I est né en 1083, à Allemagne, son père, Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Hedwig di Istria environ 1107, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1122, à Bad Segeberg, Kreis Segeberg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 39 ans.

Er hat um 1107 in Deutschland Hedwig di Istria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1122 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Bad Segeberg, Kreis Segeberg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Deutschland.

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Herman von Winzenburg I(이)가 1083년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1107년 독일에서 Hedwig di Istria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1122년 독일 프레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 세그버그 바드 세그버그에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Herman von Winzenburg I родился в 1083 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwig di Istria около 1107 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1122 г. в местности бад сегебирг, крис сегебирг, щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 39 лет.
